Tests the division of a string object by a number object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the result of dividing a `String` object containing the character "2" by a `Number` object with the value `1`. The expression `new String("2") / new Number(1)` is expected to evaluate to the number `2`. The `assert` function is used to verify that this condition is true. This code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic test to ensure that type conversion and arithmetic operations behave as expected in this specific case.
